top_signals.title: The energy crisis may just be starting
top_signals.summary: Oil futures markets are sanguine, but history shows expectations have often been disappointed
top_signals.why_it_matters: Commodity repricing impacting inflation expectations and industrial supply chains.

top_signals.title: Ethereum leads $65 billion RWA race as blockchains compete for institutional tokenization flows
top_signals.summary: The distributed market structure suggests the RWA landscape has not yet consolidated around a clear winner.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Digital asset volatility and institutional crypto positioning changes.

top_signals.title: House prices slump again in London’s wealthiest areas
top_signals.summary: London house prices fell again in March, as the capital’s wealthiest areas continued to see significant drop-offs in house values.  House prices in London fell by 2.1 per cent in the year to March, though this drop was slightly softer than the 3.1 per cent in the year to February, according to the Office for [...]
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
